nodes.name: Slack Trigger
nodes.notes: Watches #ai-stuff for messages containing YouTube URLs. Set the channelId to your #ai-stuff channel ID after import.

nodes.name: Filter YouTube URLs
nodes.notes: Only passes through messages that contain a YouTube URL.

nodes.name: Extract Video ID
nodes.notes: Parses the YouTube video ID from the Slack message. Handles youtube.com/watch, youtu.be, /live/, and /shorts/ formats.

nodes.name: Get Transcript
nodes.notes: Pulls the full transcript from YouTube using the Super Data community node. Falls back to auto-detected language if English captions aren't available.

nodes.name: Format for Vault
nodes.notes: Builds the markdown file with YAML frontmatter (processed: false) and the raw transcript. Generates a clean filename slug.

nodes.name: Write to GitHub
nodes.notes: Commits the transcript file to the tfm-vault repo. Obsidian Git will sync it to the local vault on next pull. Set your GitHub credential after import.

parameters.text:
={{ '✅ Transcript captured: *' + $json.title + '* (' + $json.channel + ')
' + $json.videoUrl + '
Saved to `' + $json.filePath + '` — will appear in Obsidian on next sync.

Process it anytime: ask Claude Code to read and extract insights from the transcript.' }}

nodes.name: Confirm in Slack
nodes.notes: Posts a confirmation reply in the thread where the URL was shared. Set the channel to #ai-stuff and your Slack credential after import.

parameters.text: ={{ '⚠️ YouTube transcript pipeline failed: ' + $json.error?.message || 'Unknown error. Check the workflow execution log.' }}

nodes.name: Error Alert
nodes.notes: If anything fails, posts the error to #ai-stuff. Common failures: no captions available, GitHub token expired, Super Data not installed.
